title: ares stock combat captures are run-to-run nondeterministic post-onset (±1 VI-frame input jitter)
repro: two stock captures of dam_combat_guard6: pre-onset 97.4% byte-stable, post-onset positions diverge up to 14.9u (reviewer-measured; chr 2 cross-capture mean 1646 vs 4157 in the FID-0054 §4 table)

history.note: Filed per the FID-0054 review: post-onset stock-vs-stock comparisons inherit this noise, so D5 work must not compare stock runs across captures — pin one stock capture per analysis or bound claims to pre-onset windows. Distinct from BUG-3 (intro camera RNG pick) and FID-0075 (native-side heavier-mission non-determinism).
